name: Claimpaign
description_short: Cardano airdrops people actually claim. Create ada, token and NFT claim campaigns, hand out QR codes, and pay only for the codes that get redeemed.
description_long:
Claimpaign is a claim-campaign platform for Cardano built on CIP-99. Organizers create a campaign for ada, fungible tokens or NFTs, and the system generates unique claim codes encoded as CIP-99 QR codes for printing or digital sharing.

Recipients scan a code with any CIP-99 compatible wallet, which posts their address to the campaign faucet; the server then builds and submits a single on-chain transaction per claim from a hot wallet. Because settlement happens only on redemption, organizers pay for the codes people actually claim and unclaimed credits are refunded when the campaign ends. Real-time tracking shows claims, wallet activity and redemption status throughout. It is aimed at event organizers, conference hosts, meetups and hackathons that need frictionless onboarding and distribution.

products.name: Claimpaign
products.description: CIP-99 claim-campaign platform for distributing ada, tokens and NFTs via QR codes.
